description: A task, stage, or operation that takes abnormally long to complete, times out, or shows slow execution warnings.

symptom_type.description: Fixed value identifying the symptom category

service.description: The service or component experiencing the slow/timeout event

event.description: Brief description of the slow or timed-out operation

duration.description: Observed duration or delay value mentioned in the log (e.g. '120s', '5000 ms')

regex.description: Python regex pattern matching the log line that contains the timing anomaly

line.description: Line number in the log file

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the event extracted from the log line
